# Marketing site routes

## Why this folder exists

Public oando.co.in pages: home, products, catalog, contact, careers, legal, etc.

## What is here

- One folder per route (page.tsx + route-local components)
- globals.css — imports app/css/index.css

## Rules

- Route folders mirror URL paths
- Reuse components/home, components/site, features/site

---
*Generated by `scripts/generate-contents-md.mjs` — edit manifest, then `npm run docs:sync:all`.*
